allow: Bash(python3 -c "import bcrypt; [print\(f'{p}: {bcrypt.hashpw\(p.encode\(\), bcrypt.gensalt\(\)\).decode\(\)}'\) for p in ['admin123', 'staff123', 'student123']]")
